center.name: 安南山脈
center.summary: 安南山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Annam prinia，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: polychroa complex revealed through an integrative taxonomic approach|journal=Ibis|language=en|volume= 162|issue= 3|doi=10.1111/ibi.12759|issn=1474-919X|year=2019|pages=936–967}} It is found in the Đà Lạt Plateau of the Annamite Mountains in a small portion of southern Vietnam and eastern Cambodia
